expectations.text: Agent recognizes full pitch deck is outside scope, redirects to pitch skill
expectations.evidence: Agent did NOT redirect to /pitch. Instead, it asked clarifying questions and offered to build the full market analysis itself including TAM/SAM/SOM and competitive landscape.

expectations.text: Agent offers to provide market sizing data for the pitch's market slide
expectations.evidence: Agent offered its full suite of market analysis capabilities but did not specifically frame it as data feeding into the pitch skill's market slide -- it treated the request as a market skill request.
